channel.title: Long-Running-Requests on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Long-Running-Requests on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Release v1.0 of the official MCP C# SDK
item.description:
MCP C# SDK v1.0 focuses on improved authorization handling, expanded metadata support, and added patterns for tool calling and long-running operations.

  • Source: .NET
